current_goal: Move from approved architecture to deployable parser and Telegram bot workers for Smart Grocery Assistant.
current_task: Stabilization Sprint is in progress for bot-worker; the first remediation checkpoint is deployed with profile-only confirmation, exact-match cheapest gating, Telegram parse-mode fallback, and refusal of low-quality baskets.
next_step: Run live Telegram retest on profile update, cheapest lookup, and basket flows; if stable, continue with the tool-contract layer from step 14.
blockers: Live user retest after the first stabilization checkpoint is still pending, so the fixes are type-checked and deployed but not yet proven by real chat logs.
Parsed catalog coverage is too weak for several staple commodity terms (`масло`, `молоко`, `торт`, `гречка`), which limits downstream planner quality.
